title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on critical infrastructure improvements that enhance platform stability and reliability. Key fixes included resolving Salesforce deployment issues with better state and country picklist detection, and addressing platform startup problems that were affecting system performance. These behind-the-scenes improvements ensure smoother operations for your RevOps workflows.

entries.headline: Better Salesforce state and country field detection
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when you're using Salesforce state and country picklists, preventing deployment errors and ensuring your field mappings work correctly.

entries.headline: More reliable Salesforce multi-step deployments
details: Complex Salesforce deployments now process more reliably through improved workflow coordination.

entries.headline: Restored HubSpot automation capabilities
details: Fixed a critical issue that was preventing HubSpot automations from starting properly.

entries.headline: Faster platform startup times
details: Improved system startup speed by removing unnecessary connection requirements.
